nodes.speaker: Zhang Wuji
nodes.text: Greetings, my friend. I am Zhang Wuji, Leader of the Ming Cult. You look unfamiliar - have you come from afar?

nodes.speaker: Zhang Wuji
nodes.text: Though I've established myself through martial arts, I'm also quite knowledgeable about Go. I've heard you meet friends through Go - would you care to play a game with me?

nodes.speaker: Zhang Wuji
nodes.text: I've cultivated 'Great Universe Shift' for many years. In Go, it can swap the last Black stone and the last White stone, if both placements are legal.

options.text: I want to learn 'Great Universe Shift'
Leader Zhang, I'd like to play another game with you
How is Great Universe Shift used in Go?

nodes.speaker: Zhang Wuji
nodes.text: 'Great Universe Shift' is the Ming Cult's supreme martial art. In Go, it lets you swap the last Black stone and the last White stone, like undoing one move each and replaying them.

nodes.speaker: Zhang Wuji
nodes.text: This technique can flip a situation at a crucial moment. Both new placements must be legal, or the swap cannot be used. It demands exceptional internal force and understanding.

options.text: Miraculous! Please teach me, Leader Zhang

nodes.speaker: Zhang Wuji
nodes.text: Good! However, this technique is exquisitely marvelous - not just anyone can learn it. You must play a game with me first so I can assess your level.

nodes.speaker: Zhang Wuji
nodes.text: Though I'm young, I've also witnessed quite a few masters. If you can beat me, it proves you're qualified to learn this technique.

options.text: Please bestow your teaching, Leader Zhang!

nodes.speaker: Zhang Wuji
nodes.text: Brilliant! Your game is flexible and varied, quite capturing the spirit of 'Great Universe Shift.' In that case, I'll teach you this technique.

nodes.speaker: Zhang Wuji
nodes.text: The key to this technique is: at a crucial moment, swap the last Black stone and the last White stone. It is like undoing one move each and replaying them, and both placements must be legal. Limited to once per game with a 50-move cooldown.

nodes.speaker: Zhang Wuji
nodes.text: Now that you've learned this technique, you can calmly handle strong enemies in the future. But remember, no matter how high your martial arts, you must have a kind heart.

options.text: I'd like to hear more of your insights
I want to challenge you again

nodes.speaker: Zhang Wuji
nodes.text: It's alright. When I was learning martial arts, I also endured many hardships. Practice more and you'll surely succeed.

nodes.speaker: Zhang Wuji
nodes.text: Though I'm the Leader of the Ming Cult, my greatest wish is world peace and people living in peace and contentment. Life's game is the same.

nodes.speaker: Zhang Wuji
nodes.text: My godfather often said, 'The greatest heroes act for their country and people.' Though I may not achieve such greatness, I hope to do my part.

options.text: Leader Zhang has a chivalrous heart!

nodes.speaker: Zhang Wuji
nodes.text: No problem, come back when you're ready. I'll be at Brightness Peak, always welcome.

nodes.speaker: Zhang Wuji
nodes.text: Until we meet again! May you have smooth sailing in Jianghu!
